title: [codereview-P3] Docstring mentions GPS sync validation before implementation
description: The updated module docstring references GPS sync but the new test class is not yet added. This is a documentation/test sync issue. See test_scale.py:12. Fix by implementing full test or updating docstring.
close_reason: Fixed via docstring alignment, test implementation, and base.py future annotations for Python 3.9 compat. 3 clean codereview passes completed with no P0-P2 findings.
